globalNews.title: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
globalNews.summary: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.

globalNews.title: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
globalNews.summary: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.

globalNews.title: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
globalNews.summary: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.

globalNews.title: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
globalNews.summary: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".

globalNews.title: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
globalNews.summary: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.

cryptoNews.title: Bybit lands on Singapore MAS Investor Alert List
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto exchange Bybit has been added to Singapore’s MAS Investor Alert List, which flags entities that may be mistakenly perceived as licensed or regulated.

cryptoNews.title: Trace Finance raises $32M for cross-border stablecoin settlement expansion
cryptoNews.summary: The raise comes as stablecoin regulation advances globally and financial firms invest in infrastructure connecting blockchain payments with traditional banking systems.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price sets $64.5K week-to-date low as Strategy selling worries return
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin circled $65,000 after downside BTC price pressure into the FOMC meeting as analysis warned over the impact of Strategy potentially selling more BTC in the future.

cryptoNews.title: Ready USDC card halts non-EEA service after issuer change, users report
cryptoNews.summary: Users reported losing access to Ready’s USDC card outside the EEA after a card provider change triggered rapid deactivation notices.

cryptoNews.title: CoinMENA, Standard Chartered partner on UAE payment rails
cryptoNews.summary: CoinMENA will use Standard Chartered to strengthen fiat payment rails in the UAE, while Revolut reportedly secured central bank licenses ahead of a planned local launch.

aiNews.title: Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker
aiNews.summary: Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversation

aiNews.title: The slowtech revolution is here to kill your phone addiction and rescue your attention span
aiNews.summary: “People just really want to take back control of their time, their lives, their attention... They’re down for whatever helps them do that.”

aiNews.title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it.
aiNews.summary: If physical AI is going to match the accomplishments of LLMs, there's a data problem that needs to be solved.

aiNews.title: Pramaana Labs raises $27M seed round from Khosla Ventures to bring formal verification to AI
aiNews.summary: Pramaana will focus on highly sensitive verticals like law, drug discovery, and tax preparation — where errors can be costly and reliability is at a premium.

aiNews.title: Canadian pension giant joins race to fund India’s AI-fueled data center boom
aiNews.summary: The Canadian pension giant will acquire an 8.2% stake in CtrlS, a tech giant that operates more than 15 data centers across India.
